name: example-webgl-halftone-drift
title: Halftone Drift

title_i18n.ja: ハーフトーン・ドリフト

description: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: a flowing field screened through a rotated halftone dot grid into a duotone print aesthetic; move the cursor to bend the drift.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：流场经旋转半调网点屏幕化为双色印刷质感；移动光标扰动漂移。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 自包含 WebGL2 主視覺：流場經旋轉半調網點螢幕化為雙色印刷質感；移動游標擾動漂移。
description_i18n.en: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: a flowing field screened through a rotated halftone dot grid into a duotone print aesthetic; move the cursor to bend the drift.

query.en: Build a self-contained WebGL2 hero of a flowing field screened through a rotated halftone dot grid into a duotone print look, cursor-reactive.
query.zh-CN: 构建自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：流场经旋转半调网点屏幕化的双色印刷质感，光标可扰动。
